title: HS Prannoy Aims for Strong Comeback Season
indian_angle: This story focuses on top Indian shuttler HS Prannoy's aspirations for a comeback and his role in mentoring young Indian talent.
summary: HS Prannoy expresses confidence in a strong comeback season, aiming to improve his game and support the next generation of Indian players.

title: BAI Issues Advisory Against Unauthorized Badminton Premier League Season 2
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India has issued a warning regarding an unauthorized domestic league, highlighting governance efforts in Indian badminton.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has released an advisory concerning the "Passion Sphere presents Badminton Premier League – Season 2," stating it is an unauthorized event.

title: Grassroots Coaches Development Program Announced for Guwahati & Raipur
indian_angle: This circular details an upcoming coaches development program in India, crucial for nurturing future Indian badminton talent at the grassroots level.
summary: A circular has been issued for a Coaches Development Program at the Grassroot Level, scheduled for NCE Guwahati and Raipur from July 15th to 24th, 2026.

title: All India Senior Ranking Tournament Set for Chennai in July
indian_angle: This circular announces a significant national ranking tournament in Chennai, providing Indian senior players a platform to compete and improve their rankings.
summary: The BAI has released a circular for the Yonex-Sunrise All India Senior Ranking Badminton Tournament 2026, which will be held in Chennai, TN from July 16th to 23rd, 2026.

title: Indian Thomas Cup Squad Reassembles for Asian Games, Treesa-Gayatri Return
indian_angle: The reassembly of the Indian Thomas Cup squad, including the return of Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand, is crucial news for India's medal hopes at the Asian Games.
summary: The Indian Thomas Cup squad has reassembled for the upcoming Asian Games, with the notable return of the women's doubles pair Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand.

title: India Finalizes Badminton Team for 20th Asian Games 2026
indian_angle: This announcement confirms the final selection of India's badminton team for the prestigious Asian Games, a key event for national pride and performance.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has announced the finalization of the team selected to represent India at the 20th Asian Games in 2026.
